data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Self-check complete. All 4 design test functions defined (test_design_questions_conditional, test_design_areas_complete, test_design_notes_output, test_design_skip_non_ui). .test-index RED marker updated to [test_design_areas_complete] (linter corrected from [test_design_questions_conditional] — [test_design_areas_complete] is the first actually-failing test, more accurate). Both acceptance criteria PASS. Task complete — no commit per instructions.
